issues.description: Missing condition 'Once Per Turn' on the Activated trigger. DSL requires explicit turnLimit or similar constraint.
KO target must filter for {Thriller Bark Pirates} type Characters. Current target lacks type filter.
TrashFromHand action should have a conditional structure: 'may trash 3' means it's optional and enables the subsequent FlipLife. Current DSL doesn't capture the optional/conditional relationship.

FlipLife should be conditional on trashing 3 cards (thenActions of the trash action), not a separate parallel action. Also, 'up to 1 card from top of deck to top of Life' requires SearchDeck with placement detail, not just FlipLife count.
